fields.helpText: Descriptive title indicating the purpose of the screen.
This string takes the form of a valid IF statement without an action to perform.

This is a flag used by the Lexicon to differentiate between screens defined for users and screens defined specifically for an application.  This flag also controls how an entry is indexed.     U - User screen   A - Application screen   This field is populated by DB Integration Agreement only.
This is the application namespace (where type of screen = "A") for which the screen was developed.   This field is populated by DB Integration Agreement only.

This is the file number where an application will store the pointer to the Expressions file (#757.01).  This field should only contain data if the  screen has been defined as the default screen for the application.
Basic description of the intended use of the filter/screen.

Not all screens (filters) will work with all vocabularies.  For example, the "Nursing Diagnosis only" screen used on the Dental vocabulary will result in "No matches found".  This is a list of the vocabularies (the vocabulary mnemonic) which the screen will work successfully with.
